prompt:
{"type":"elegant Japanese palm reading guide infographic","language":"Japanese visible text","style":"minimal premium editorial design, warm off-white paper background, thin black and beige line art, soft rounded cards, delicate gold accents, calm fortune-telling aesthetic, high resolution, clean margins","main_title":"{argument name="headline text" default="手相鑑定ガイド"}","subtitle":"{argument name="subtitle text" default="あなたの手のひらから読み解く性質と運勢"}","layout":{"orientation":"portrait","top":"large centered Japanese headline with small gold sparkle above, subtitle below with thin horizontal gold divider lines","centerpiece":"large simple line drawing of an open palm facing viewer, black outline with faint internal palm creases, positioned center-right, with leader lines and dot markers pointing to palm lines","summary_card":{"position":"upper left","title":"{argument name="type label" default="総合タイプ"}","icon":"small compass star inside a circle","body":"バランスの取れた現実派タイプ。
思慮深く誠実で、周囲からの
信頼を大切にします。
努力を積み重ねることで、
着実に理想を形にできる人です。"},"palm_labels":{"count":6,"labels":[{"text":"感情線","position":"upper left of palm, leader line to upper palm"},{"text":"知能線","position":"left middle, horizontal leader line to center palm"},{"text":"生命線","position":"left lower, horizontal leader line to thumb arc"},{"text":"太陽線","position":"right upper, leader line to ring-finger area"},{"text":"財運線","position":"right middle, leader line to little-finger side"},{"text":"運命線","position":"right lower, leader line to vertical center line"}]},"analysis_cards":{"position":"bottom two rows of three rounded cards","count":6,"cards":[{"number":"1","icon":"leaf","title":"生命線","body":"適度な長さで滑らかなカーブを描く
生命線です。
体力・回復力が安定しており、
無理をしすぎなければ、
長く安定した運気を保てます。"},{"number":"2","icon":"light bulb","title":"知能線","body":"やや長めで、やや下向きに伸びる
知能線です。
論理的思考に優れる一方で、
想像力や直感も豊か。
柔軟な発想で道を切り開けます。"},{"number":"3","icon":"heart","title":"感情線","body":"穏やかでバランスの良い感情線です。
誠実で思いやりがあり、感情の
コントロールが上手。
信頼できる安定した関係を
築けるタイプです。"},{"number":"4","icon":"flag","title":"運命線","body":"はっきりとありますが、濃すぎない
運命線です。
自力で道を切り開くタイプで、
努力が実を結びやすい相。
経験を重ねるほど運気が強まります。"},{"number":"5","icon":"sun","title":"太陽線・財運線","body":"太陽線と財運線は細く複数見られ、
人気運や金運は、信頼の積み重ねや
スキルの向上とともに
ゆるやかに高まっていきます。
コツコツ継続がカギになります。"},{"number":"6","icon":"feather pen","title":"アドバイス","body":"分析力と直感のバランスを活かし、
長期的な視点で専門性を磨きましょう。
考えすぎて動けなくなる時は、
小さな一歩を大切に。
継続が未来の大きな成功につながります。"}]},"footer":{"position":"bottom full-width rounded rectangle","decorations":"gold sparkle icons at left and right","text":"{argument name="footer message" default="あなたの手は「着実に積み上げて輝く手相」です。
信頼・努力・継続を大切にすることで、理想の未来を自らつくり出せます。"}"}},"typography":"Japanese Mincho-style serif for titles, clean readable Japanese body text, black ink with muted beige numbering circles","composition_notes":"Use exact card count of 6, exact palm label count of 6, restrained monochrome linework, no photography, no hands holding objects, no clutter."}
